# Cyan — Freelance Web3 & Full-Stack Developer

> Cyan (cbpas) is a freelance full-stack software developer with 5+ years of experience, specializing in Solidity, EVM ecosystems, DeFi protocols, and modern React/Node.js infrastructure. Available for new projects.

## About

Cyan builds secure smart contracts and scalable web applications. He has shipped production-grade code for DeFi protocols, decentralized launchpads, and hardware authentication systems on EVM-compatible blockchains.

- Email: cbpas3@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/cbpas3
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cbpas/
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/Iam00ffff

## Skills & Specialties

- Smart contract development: Solidity, EVM ecosystems, Hardhat, Foundry
- DeFi: TWAP mechanics, MEV protection, keeper systems, tokenomics
- Blockchain indexing: Envio HyperIndex, The Graph
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Next.js, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Node.js, REST APIs, real-time systems
- Cryptography: PBT (Physically Backed Tokens), hardware authentication, signature verification

## Case Studies

### Aerostrategy — Securing against MEV sandwich attacks
Built a Sherlock-audited "Buyback & Burn" smart contract engine with TWAP protection, slicing large treasury buybacks into automated smaller trades via a Keeper System. Eliminated MEV bot exposure and automated manual treasury operations.
Technologies: Solidity, TWAP, Keeper Systems, DeFi

### Onyx — Bypassing expensive data providers
Built a custom real-time indexing engine using Envio HyperIndex with dynamic factory listeners, aggregating raw on-chain OHLCV trading data for newly launched tokens. Eliminated dependency on expensive enterprise data APIs.
Technologies: Envio HyperIndex, TypeScript, DeFi

### Arx Research Inc. — Bridging physical items on-chain
Authored the ProjectRegistrar smart contract for claiming digital ownership of physical goods via Physically Backed Tokens (PBT). Implemented cryptographic "Custody Proof" verification using signatures generated directly by physical chips.
Technologies: Solidity, PBT, Cryptography, Hardware Authentication

## Availability

Currently available for freelance engagements. Interested in DeFi protocols, smart contract audits, dApp development, and full-stack web projects.
